title: Taking Care of a Pet 养宠物
scene: 一家人讨论养宠物的事情。

lines.en: Mom, can we get a pet?
lines.zh: 妈妈，我们能养一只宠物吗？

lines.en: What kind of pet do you want?
I really want a puppy. They are so cute!
lines.zh: 我很想要一只小狗。它们好可爱！

lines.en: A dog needs a lot of care. Are you ready for that?
lines.zh: 狗需要很多照顾。你准备好了吗？

lines.en: Yes! I will walk it every day and feed it.
lines.zh: 准备好了！我会每天遛它、喂它。

lines.en: Who will clean up after it?
I will! I promise to take good care of it.
lines.zh: 我来！我保证会好好照顾它。

lines.en: OK. Let us go to the animal shelter this weekend.
lines.zh: 好吧。这周末我们去动物收容所看看。

lines.en: But remember, a pet is a big responsibility.
lines.zh: 但记住，养宠物是很大的责任。
